_comment: Task-matched eval scene #1: YELLOW CYLINDERS -> tray (best asset match; corn_can_hope_robolab is a
yellow-ish cylinder, = the object the sim was already iterated on). Caption is copied VERBATIM from a
v6/v2 training instruction so the merged (v2-caption) model sees an in-distribution language+scene pair.
Object placement (WAM_CUBE_X/Y/Z) is tuned via env in the eval job; remote_host = the v8 server.

jobs.name: trossen_cylinders_v8
jobs.language_instruction: Pick up all the yellow cylindrical objects from the table and place them into the blue tray.
